text.title: X / Twitter Ads Strategy Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: Faion SaaS X promoted-tweet on follower-LAL of @faion_net core followers (3.5k source). Target CPC $0.85.
example.note: Vertical match (B2B SaaS), LAL targeting, exclusions seeded, KPI locked.
